# Apex Documentation Index

This is a compact AI-facing map for Apex. Prefer these entry points before reading large specs or audit folders.

## Core Indexes

- `docs/APEX_CONTEXT_INDEX.md`: low-token context boot map.
- `docs/APEX_TOOL_MENU.md`: tool selection cover page with exact calls and troubleshoot links.
- `docs/APEX_WORKSPACE_MENU.md`: current workspace artifact group map.
- `docs/APEX_REPO_MENU.md`: repository selection and state map.
- `registry/TOOL_INDEX.md`: approved callable tools.
- `docs/DOCUMENT_REGISTER.md`: governed artifact status and paths.

## Autonomous Delivery

- `audit/CERT-APEX-AUTONOMOUS-DELIVERY.json`: foundation certificate and evidence.
- `docs/spec/SPEC-APEX-AUTONOMOUS-DELIVERY-SYSTEM.md`: full autonomous delivery architecture.
- `docs/research/APEX-TOOL-MENU-RESEARCH-2026-05-25.md`: research on the tool menu concept and alternatives.

## Tool Documentation

Each approved tool uses:

- `docs/tools/<tool>/blueprint.md`
- `docs/tools/<tool>/guidance.md`
- `docs/tools/<tool>/test_record.md`
- `docs/tools/<tool>/troubleshoot.md`

When a reusable fix is found, append it to the matching `troubleshoot.md`.

## Governance

- `AGENTS.md`: Codex/agent boot instructions.
- `CLAUDE.md`: Claude boot instructions.
- `docs/NAMING_CONVENTION.md`: document control and approval rules.
- `registry/validate_tool_docs.py`: validation for approved tool docs.
- `registry/generate_tool_menu.py`: regenerates the Markdown tool menu from JSON.
- `registry/generate_repo_menu.py`: scans repository roots and regenerates repo menus.
